rows.move_name: 弱 サンダースラップ
rows.input_raw_display: key-d key-dl key-l key-plus icon_punch_l 弱

input_tokens.value: 弱 サンダースラップ

rows.notes: 12F目にフェイントに派生可 20F目にヒット/ガード時専用技に派生可
rows.supercombo_notes: Crouch-sized hurtbox on frames 14-43 (standing state); can be spaced meaty for better advantage (very precise spacing required for the final active frame to connect); can duck under projectiles with precise timing (impractical as a reaction to fast fireballs, and can be clipped on her back during recovery against slow fireballs); combos naturally from medium/heavy normals; punishing a projectile can link into lights, 2MP, or SA2 depending on the range; startup can be canceled into Feint by inputting K (feint occurs after 12 startup frames); cancelable into Tracer Combination (6PP) on hit/block only

rows.move_name: 中 サンダースラップ
rows.input_raw_display: key-d key-dl key-l key-plus icon_punch_m 中

input_tokens.value: 中 サンダースラップ

rows.notes: 8F目にフェイントに派生可 19F目にヒット/ガード時専用技に派生可
rows.supercombo_notes: Less range than LP version but safe on block at all ranges; can be spaced meaty for better advantage; combos from 5LK naturally; startup can be canceled into Feint by inputting K (feint occurs after 8 startup frames); cancelable into Tracer Combination (6PP) on hit/block only; can perform a risky frame trap into follow-up on block (2f gap) unless the move connects on the final 2 active frames

rows.move_name: 強 サンダースラップ
rows.input_raw_display: key-d key-dl key-l key-plus icon_punch_h 強

input_tokens.value: 強 サンダースラップ

rows.notes: 1-9F 空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵 9-31F 空中判定 6F目にフェイントに派生可 17F目にヒット時専用技に派生可
rows.supercombo_notes: Upward trajectory for juggles and anti-airs; cannot hit cross-up; combos from all light normals; can whiff in long-range cancels like 5MK > HJC 214HP; startup can be canceled into Feint by inputting K (feint occurs after 6 startup frames, leading to the best advantage of all feint cancels); feint-canceled version still maintains anti-air invincibility on frames 1-6, allowing C.Viper to "spot dodge" some airborne attacks with precise timing for a better punish; variable knockdown advantage on airborne opponents; cancelable into Tracer Combination (6PP) on hit only (can whiff on high juggled opponents)

rows.move_name: OD サンダースラップ
rows.input_raw_display: key-d key-dl key-l key-plus icon_punch icon_punch

input_tokens.value: OD サンダースラップ

rows.combo_scaling: 始動補正30% コンボ補正20%
rows.supercombo_notes: 2 hits with a large gap in between; range of the 1st hit is in between LP/MP versions (total range is longer but easily interruptible if 1st hit whiffs); combos from medium and heavy normals; allows an easy hitconfirm into SA2/SA3 while remaining safe on block; leaves C.Viper inside throw range with block advantage on burned out opponents, making it a strong chip and pressure tool; cannot perform feint cancels or Tracer Combination follow-ups; if Perfect Parried, opponent can interrupt 2nd hit with 18f or faster attack; extremely disjointed hitbox makes it a strong approach tool at midrange; sets up a safe jump on grounded hit (midscreen, can only connect with max range j.MK)

rows.move_name: 強 バーニングキック

rows.supercombo_notes: Farthest trajectory; cannot hit cross-up; Punish Counter gives an extra +5 KD advantage (allows combo into KK follow-up); useful as a safe approach tool from long range (but more likely to land inside opponent's throw range on block); easiest version to space meaty for extra advantage due to forward movement during active frames; works well as a predictive fireball counter due to its range, safety, and lower body projectile invuln frames

rows.move_name: 弱 空中バーニングキック

input_tokens.value: 弱 空中バーニングキック
（垂直 or 前ジャンプ中に）

rows.notes: めくり性能 ガードさせた高度によって硬直差が変化 相手を飛び越えてガード時、着地硬直1F増加 相手を飛び越えて空振り時、着地硬直8F増加
rows.supercombo_notes: Can be input from a forward/neutral jump or High Jump; stops forward air momentum; can hit crossup; 1f extra landing recovery frame when blocked as a cross-up; 8f extra landing recovery on whiff after crossing over the opponent; comes out after 7 airborne frames (normal jump) or 3 airborne frames (High Jump); High Jump version deals 1f less blockstun but hits lower to the ground resulting in better advantage when used low to the ground; advantage on knockdown or block varies greatly depending on angle, distance, and height when activated; earliest input timing (Tiger Knee input) at close range results in KD +39 / -2 oB (regular jump), KD +43 / +1 oB (High Jump)

rows.supercombo_notes: Can be input from a forward/neutral jump or High Jump; maintains some forward air momentum; can hit crossup; 1f extra landing recovery frame when blocked as a cross-up; 8f extra landing recovery on whiff after crossing over the opponent; comes out after 7 airborne frames (normal jump) or 3 airborne frames (High Jump); High Jump version deals 1f less blockstun but hits lower to the ground resulting in better advantage when used low to the ground; advantage on knockdown or block varies greatly depending on angle, distance, and height when activated; earliest input timing (Tiger Knee input) at close range results in KD +40 / -1 oB (regular jump), KD +43 / +1 oB (High Jump); using this version after Seismic Hammer launch allows a midscreen juggle into MP Thunder Dash + Tracer Combination (great damage, oki, and potential SA3 cancel with less meter cost than OD Burning Kick routes)

rows.move_name: 弱 セイスモハンマー
rows.input_raw_display: key-r key-d key-dr key-plus icon_punch_l 弱

rows.notes: 11F目にフェイントに派生可 ハイジャンプキャンセル可能
rows.supercombo_notes: 1-hit standard projectile; button strength determines projectile distance (LP close, MP ~50% screen, HP ~80% screen); puts opponents into a limited juggle state; combos from 2HP or from High Jump canceled 5HP/5HK; cancelable into High Jump on hit or block for 1 extra Drive bar (no extra cost during SA1 install); all strengths will not go beyond the corner; can transition into Seismo Feint after 11f (total Feint duration 27f); HJC~214HP Feint cancel: KD +61 / -2 oB; great tool for Burnout pressure (can repeatedly chain Seismos together with High Jump cancels until pushed out of range); can connect 9 consecutive HP Seismos on a blocking cornered opponent (if starting from a canceled normal, 5HP > HJC Seismo is the best option with 8 consecutive Seismo chains); hitbox is very low to the ground, allowing opponent to block when landing from an empty jump

rows.notes: 11F目にフェイントに派生可 ハイジャンプキャンセル可能
rows.supercombo_notes: 1-hit standard projectile; button strength determines projectile distance (LP close, MP ~50% screen, HP ~80% screen); puts opponents into a limited juggle state; combos from 2HP or from High Jump canceled 5HP/5HK; cancelable into High Jump on hit or block for 1 extra Drive bar (no extra cost during SA1 install); all strengths will not go beyond the corner; can transition into Seismo Feint after 11f (total Feint duration 27f); HJC~214HP Feint cancel: KD +61 / -2 oB; great tool for Burnout pressure (can repeatedly chain Seismos together with High Jump cancels until pushed out of range); can connect 9 consecutive HP Seismos on a blocking cornered opponent (if starting from a canceled normal, 5HP > HJC Seismo is the best option with 8 consecutive Seismo chains); hitbox is very low to the ground, allowing opponent to block when landing from an empty jump

rows.move_name: セービングフォース(Lv1)
rows.input_raw_display: key-d key-dl key-l key-plus icon_kick
rows.notes: 6-13F 全身アーマー判定(1回)、ホールドにより59Fまで延長可 アーマー判定で打撃攻撃を受け止めた際、自動発動 11-13Fまで、 前方ステップに派生可、ホールド時は59Fまで派生可 20F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動 59F以上ボタンを押し続けるとLv3が発動 パニッシュカウンター時吹き飛び時間延長
rows.supercombo_notes: Lv.1 version when uncharged or when button is held up to 19f; can hold button longer to charge to a stronger version (20f Lv.2 / 59f Lv.3); 1-hit armor frames cover the full body, ending immediately if button is released after frame 13; absorbing a strike results in an automatic counter-attack with 10f startup (comes out on frame 14 at the earliest); absorbing an attack early in the armor frames makes it possible for the counter-attack to be blocked; C. Viper incurs only 7f armor hitstop from absorbing a strike; armor can absorb projectiles but does not perform counter-attack (C. Viper incurs 10f projectile hitstop during armor); cancelable into Forward Dash from frame 12 until button is released (not possible after absorbing a strike); C. Viper is in a Punish Counter state for entire duration (including Forward Dash cancel); 2f extra knockdown advantage on Punish Counter; only the first hit gains the bonus damage from a Counter-hit/Punish Counter; -17 on Punish Counter if only the first hit of counter-attack reaches opponent (e.g. absorbing a ranged Dhalsim poke); Focus + Dash can be used to absorb projectiles when Drive gauge is too low for Parry; can be used against Drive Impact while in Burnout (but armor starts too late to work in most DI-cancel blockstrings)

rows.move_name: SA1 バウンサーステップ
rows.input_raw_display: key-d key-dr key-r key-d key-dr key-r key-plus icon_kick

input_tokens.value: SA1 バウンサーステップ

rows.notes: 1-11F 打撃・投げに対して無敵 12-20F 空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵 12-42F 空中判定 タイマー700付与、発動中Dゲージ消費無しで派生技とハイジャンプが可能 （バーンアウト中はタイマーを全消費して派生技とハイジャンプが発動可能） タイマー中に派生技をヒット/ガード時にDゲージ3000回復する カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない 最低保障ダメージ30％
rows.supercombo_notes: Puts C.Viper into an install state on frame 21 (after active frames) that removes the meter cost of her 1-bar moves (High Jump, extensions from Thunder Dash and Burning Kick) and also causes the 1-bar special follow-ups to build 3000 Drive gauge on hit/block; during Burnout, the install ends after one use of these moves; install lasts for 700 frames (11.7 seconds) and freezes during hitstop or cinematics; cannot build additional Super gauge while install is active; KD advantage varies slightly when used in juggles or as an anti-air; if 1st hit is Perfect Parried, opponent can interrupt 2nd hit with 5f or faster attack that reaches around standing chest-height; if 1st hit trades with a projectile at close range, C. Viper can pick up a juggle into 214HP, SA1, or SA2 depending on the distance and fireball hitstun (useful in blockstrings with a large gap, like Terry 5HP > Round Wave)

rows.move_name: オーバーインパルス
rows.input_raw_display: （近距離で） key-nutral key-or key-r key-plus icon_punch_l 弱 icon_kick_l 弱
rows.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化 ・ダメージ2040 ・SAゲージ4000増加 ・ハードノックダウン
rows.supercombo_notes: Grants a corner throw loop by walking or dashing (+7, requires delayed throw); can pressure with MK Burning Kick (+2 oB, DI-safe), MK Burning Kick ~ Double Burn (also +2 oB, true blockstring, gives better Drive damage but the sequence loses to wakeup DI), or HK Burning Kick ~ Double Burn (leaves a small blockstring gap between hits, allowing C. Viper to land and counter-DI); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

rows.move_name: サンダークレイドル
rows.input_raw_display: （近距離で） key-l key-plus icon_punch_l 弱 icon_kick_l 弱
rows.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化 ・ダメージ2040 ・SAゲージ4000増加 ・ハードノックダウン
rows.supercombo_notes: Side switch; can pressure with Drive Rush after a corner side switch (but cannot beat reversal 4f normals with another throw); meaty LK Burning Kick can lead to a DI-safe Double Burn blockstring, but loses to wakeup Drive Impact; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

rows.move_name: ドライブパリィ
rows.input_raw_display: icon_punch_m 中 icon_kick_m 中
rows.notes: ※1 動作の4F目からドライブラッシュでキャンセル可 ※2 ボタンホールドでパリィの持続を延長可 硬直部分はガードのみ可 動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
rows.supercombo_notes: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.

rows.move_name: ジャストパリィ（打撃）
rows.input_raw_display: ガード方向 key-plus icon_punch_m 中 icon_kick_m 中
rows.notes: 相手の攻撃に対応した方向入力を行った状態でパリィを入力し、 入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する （上段/中段攻撃に対して←方向、下段攻撃に対しては↙方向) 方向が正しくなかった場合は通常のドライブパリィとなり、追加でDゲージが3000増加する 硬直終了から5Fの間完全無敵 （パリィを継続した場合は無敵にならない） ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
rows.supercombo_notes: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.
